creator: david@aitch2o.com
text:
so revisiting this, the issue is still here, tried to create a cluster cluster with BSD 13.1 nodes and 2 BSD 13.1 clients and both clients can write to the cluster volume the same file and the file will never be identical

So I think there is a definite problem with fuse mounting glustervolumes

I will abandon this issue and move to a linux disribution instead.
